seo.title: OMG Ponnu Lyrics From Sarkar
seo.description: Full OMG Ponnu songs lyrics, sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vivek, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Jonita Gandhi, Sid Sriram.
seo.keywords: Vivek, AR Rahman, Jonita Gandhi, Sid Sriram, OMG Ponnu full lyrics,  songs lyrics, OMG Ponnu lyrics snippets, OMG Ponnu WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share OMG Ponnu lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'OMG Ponnu'?

The song 'OMG Ponnu' expresses youthful love and the excitement that comes with it, featuring playful and modern lyrics.

In which movie is 'OMG Ponnu' featured?

'OMG Ponnu' is featured in the movie Sarkar, which revolves around political themes and social issues.

Who are the singers of 'OMG Ponnu'?

The song is sung by Jonita Gandhi and Sid Sriram, both of whom bring a unique charm to the track.

Who composed the music for 'OMG Ponnu'?

The music for 'OMG Ponnu' was composed by the renowned AR Rahman, known for his innovative musical style.

When was 'OMG Ponnu' released?

'OMG Ponnu' was released on October 3, 2018, and quickly became a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'OMG Ponnu' is a lively and romantic song that encapsulates the thrill of young love, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The playful lyrics and upbeat melody create an infectious vibe that resonates with listeners. Set against the backdrop of Sarkar, the song highlights the carefree moments of romance amidst the film's serious themes. With its catchy tune and engaging performances by Jonita Gandhi and Sid Sriram, this track evokes feelings of joy and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: OMG Ponnu is a vibrant and catchy duet that perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance. With the unique collaboration of Jonita Gandhi and Sid Sriram, this song is a delightful blend of modern beats and playful lyrics. Experience the magic of Sarkar as AR Rahman's music elevates the mood to a whole new level!
stanzaMeanings: Oh, oh, oh, eyes, great eyes, also known as the moonlight's connection.
Oh, sweet one, hugs and kisses, later, like Cinderella.
OMG girl, I love you, come quickly, you are my bae, my best friend, can I laugh out loud?
In my opinion, you, you, you, you are a thousand girls, I don't know how much I like you, tell me.
In my opinion, only you are beautiful, my wife should never go even one millimeter away, always stay close.
I don't know how I will live without you.
Oh, oh, oh, eyes, great eyes, also known as the moonlight's connection.
When I see your face, it will become good in my heart, good night sweet dreams.
In my phone, everything is laughter, you are my sweetheart.
I am out of town, but I always need to know how you are. Oh, daily five times, I want to kiss you, miss you, and see a smiley.
The day I meet you will be my birthday. Just a little bit of you 24/7 is enough for me.
Oh my dear, will you say thank you for my work?
Oh my dear, will you take care of me?
OMG girl, I love you, come quickly, you are my bae, my best friend, can I laugh out loud?
In my opinion, you, you, you, you are a thousand girls, I don't know how much I like you, tell me.
In my opinion, only you are beautiful, my wife should never go even one millimeter away, always stay close.
I don't know how I will live without you.
Oh, oh, oh, eyes, great eyes, also known as the moonlight's connection.
Oh, sweet one, hugs and kisses, later, like Cinderella.
